fd_mean.name: fd_mean
fd_mean.description: MRIQC IQM: average framewise displacement over the BOLD run (mm).

fd_num.name: fd_num
fd_num.description: MRIQC IQM: number of frames with framewise displacement above the threshold.

fd_perc.name: fd_perc
fd_perc.description: MRIQC IQM: percentage of frames above the framewise-displacement threshold.

tsnr.name: tsnr
tsnr.description: MRIQC IQM: median temporal signal-to-noise ratio of the BOLD run.

gsr_x.name: gsr_x
gsr_x.description: MRIQC IQM: ghost-to-signal ratio along the x axis.

gsr_y.name: gsr_y
gsr_y.description: MRIQC IQM: ghost-to-signal ratio along the y axis.

gcor.name: gcor
gcor.description: MRIQC IQM: global correlation of the BOLD signal.

aor.name: aor
aor.description: MRIQC IQM: mean fraction of outliers per fMRI volume (AFNI's 3dToutcount).

snr_total.name: snr_total
snr_total.description: MRIQC IQM: signal-to-noise ratio averaged over all tissues (anatomical).

cjv.name: cjv
cjv.description: MRIQC IQM: coefficient of joint variation of GM and WM (anatomical).

efc.name: efc
efc.description: MRIQC IQM: entropy focus criterion (ghosting/blurring from head motion).

fwhm_avg.name: fwhm_avg
fwhm_avg.description: MRIQC IQM: average full-width half-maximum of the spatial smoothness (anatomical).

qi_1.name: qi_1
qi_1.description: MRIQC IQM: proportion of voxels with artifacts in the air background (anatomical).

qi_2.name: qi_2
qi_2.description: MRIQC IQM: goodness-of-fit of the air-background noise to a chi-squared model (anatomical).

wm2max.name: wm2max
wm2max.description: MRIQC IQM: median intensity within white matter relative to the 99.95th percentile (anatomical).
